---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Which area does this affect?**
- [ ] Setup / Authentication (`Initialize-TCM`)
- [ ] Snapshots (`New-TCMSnapshot`, `ConvertTo-TCMBaseline`)
- [ ] Monitors (`New-TCMMonitor`, `Get-TCMMonitor`)
- [ ] Drift Detection (`Get-TCMDrift`)
- [ ] Maester Bridge (`Sync-TCMDriftToMaester`)
- [ ] Reporting (`Export-TCMDriftReport`)
- [ ] Quota Management (`Get-TCMQuota`)
- [ ] Baseline Templates (CIS/CISA)
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or code snippets here.
